request.description: Implement production-ready multi-persona group chat, Dashboard overhaul, 2026 aesthetic, and full AI agent pipeline
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Forge (formerly Catbot)

### 1.2 Application Description
A multi-persona AI chat platform with debate rooms and group chat capabilities. Users can build customizable AI personas, share them publicly, engage in one-on-one conversations, participate in multi-persona group debates, join real-time debate rooms with fact-checking, and manage AI agents. Built on React + TypeScript + Supabase stack.

### 1.3 Version Update
v17 → v18 Phase 5 Final Beta → v19 Production Release

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- Users wanting to create and customize AI personas with specific personalities
- Users seeking to orchestrate multi-persona group debates with 2-6 AI personas responding in real-time
- Users needing organized conversation management with search capabilities
- Users wanting to participate in real-time group debates with AI fact-checking
- Anonymous users joining debate rooms without accounts
- External visitors landing on public persona pages
- First-time visitors needing guided onboarding experience
- Users exploring public persona gallery for discovery
- Users evaluating pricing tiers and purchasing credits
- Users managing AI agents and workflows in Agent Studio

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Creating AI personas with customizable traits and behaviors
- Starting multi-persona group chat sessions with selected personas responding live
- Managing group chat sessions with ability to add/remove personas mid-session
- Searching through conversation history quickly
- Switching between different personas during chat
- Creating debate rooms with specific topics and access controls
- Joining debate rooms anonymously or with display names
- Fact-checking messages in real-time with AI-powered verdicts
- Viewing dashboard with usage stats and recent activity
- Browsing persona library with category filters and preview modals
- Comparing pricing tiers and purchasing credits via Stripe
- Managing API keys for multiple providers in settings
- Exporting conversations as PDF or Markdown

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Forge (Multi-Persona AI Chat Platform)
├── Dashboard/Home Page (/) - NEW
│   ├── Usage Stats Cards
│   ├── Recent Activity Feed
│   ├── Quick-Start Cards (4 features)
│   └── Active Rooms Sidebar
├── Sidebar Navigation - REDESIGNED
│   ├── Section: Core Features
│   │   ├── Dashboard (icon + label)
│   │   ├── AI Chat (icon + label)
│   │   ├── Group Chat (icon + label) - NEW
│   │   └── Debate Rooms (icon + label)
│   ├── Section: Tools
│   │   ├── Agent Studio (icon + label)
│   │   └── Personas (icon + label)
│   ├── Section: Account
│   │   ├── Credits (icon + label)
│   │   └── Settings (icon + label)
│   └── Footer: BETA badge + Give Feedback link
├── First-Run Onboarding Modal
│   ├── Step 1: Welcome
│   ├── Step 2: Build a Persona
│   ├── Step 3: Chat with AI
│   ├── Step 4: Join a Debate Room
│   └── Step 5: Share & Explore
├── AI Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId)
│   ├── Conversation Sidebar with Search
│   ├── Chat View
│   ├── Model Selector Dropdown - ENHANCED
│   ├── Web Search Toggle - NEW
│   ├── Persona Quick-Switch - ENHANCED
│   ├── Export Conversation Button - NEW
│   └── Chat Input Area
├── Multi-Persona Group Chat - NEW
│   ├── Group Chat Sessions List (/group-chat)
│   └── Group Chat Room (/group-chat/:sessionId)
│       ├── Persona Selector Panel
│       ├── Live Chat Thread
│       ├── Per-Persona Typing Indicators
│       ├── Session Controls (add/remove personas)
│       └── Save Session Button
├── Persona Management
│   ├── Persona Library Page (/personas) - COMPLETED
│   │   ├── Category Filter Tabs
│   │   ├── Search Bar
│   │   ├── Persona Preview Modals
│   │   └── 1-Click Start Chat Button
│   ├── Persona Creation Page (/personas/create)
│   └── Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId)
├── Agent Studio (/agent-studio) - ALREADY REBUILT
├── Credits & Pricing Page (/credits) - STRIPE INTEGRATION COMPLETE
│   ├── Plan Cards with Purchase Flow
│   └── Transaction History Section
├── Debate Rooms
│   ├── Rooms List Page (/rooms)
│   ├── Room Creation Page (/rooms/create)
│   └── Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId)
├── Creator Dashboard (/dashboard)
├── Settings Page (/settings) - COMPLETED
│   ├── API Key Management (all providers)
│   ├── Add/Remove/Test Key Flows
│   └── Account Preferences
├── Contacts Page (/contacts) - ALREADY FIXED
├── System Test Page (/system-test) - ALREADY FIXED
└── 404 Not Found Page
```

### 3.1 Dashboard/Home Page (/) - NEW
**Purpose:** Central landing page showing platform overview and quick access to all features

**Core Functions:**
- Display usage stats cards: total conversations, personas created, debate rooms joined, credits remaining
- Show recent activity feed: last 5 conversations, recent persona creations, recent room joins
- Provide 4 quick-start cards with CTAs:
  + AI Chat: Start a new conversation
  + Group Chat: Launch multi-persona debate
  + Agent Studio: Build an agent
  + Debate Rooms: Join or create a room
- Include active rooms sidebar showing live debate rooms

**Visual Requirements:**
- Glassmorphism panels for stats cards
- Animated gradient accents on quick-start cards
- Particle/grid background on hero section
- Smooth hover animations on interactive elements
- Electric violet design system

### 3.2 Sidebar Navigation - REDESIGNED
**Purpose:** Organized navigation with clear section groupings

**Core Functions:**
- Section 1 Core Features:
  + Dashboard (home icon)
  + AI Chat (chat bubble icon)
  + Group Chat (multiple personas icon) - NEW
  + Debate Rooms (debate icon)
- Section 2 Tools:
  + Agent Studio (robot icon)
  + Personas (mask icon)
- Section 3 Account:
  + Credits (coin icon)
  + Settings (gear icon)
- Footer area:
  + BETA badge
  + Give Feedback link
- Active state highlighting for current page
- Hover effects on navigation items

**Visual Requirements:**
- Section dividers with subtle lines
- Icons for each navigation item
- Active state with electric violet accent
- Smooth hover transitions
- Collapsed/expanded states for mobile

### 3.3 Multi-Persona Group Chat - NEW FEATURE

#### 3.3.1 Group Chat Sessions List (/group-chat)
**Purpose:** Manage and access multi-persona group chat sessions

**Core Functions:**
- Display list of saved group chat sessions
- Show session preview: topic, participating personas (avatars), last message timestamp
- \"New Group Chat\" CTA button
- Search and filter sessions
- Delete session option

**Visual Requirements:**
- Session cards with glassmorphism effect
- Persona avatars displayed in row
- Hover lift effect on cards
- Empty state with illustration and CTA

#### 3.3.2 Group Chat Room (/group-chat/:sessionId)
**Purpose:** Real-time multi-persona group debate interface

**Core Functions:**
- Persona selector panel: pick 2-6 personas from library
- Live chat thread displaying:
  + User message
  + Each selected persona's response in sequence
  + Each persona sees prior persona responses in thread
- Per-persona typing indicators with distinct avatar colors
- Session controls:
  + Add persona button (opens persona selector)
  + Remove persona button (removes from active session)
  + Save session button
- Full chat history with scroll
- Message input area for user

**Visual Requirements:**
- Persona selector as sidebar or modal
- Chat messages with persona avatar and name
- Typing indicators with animated dots and persona color
- Distinct visual styling per persona (color-coded borders or backgrounds)
- Glassmorphism panels for controls
- Smooth animations for persona responses streaming in

**Interaction Flow:**
1. User selects 2-6 personas from library
2. User sends a message
3. Each persona responds in sequence, seeing prior responses
4. Typing indicators show which persona is currently responding
5. User can add/remove personas mid-session
6. Session auto-saves, user can manually save with name

### 3.4 Persona Library Page (/personas) - COMPLETED
**Purpose:** Full searchable library with category filters and preview modals

**Core Functions:**
- Category filter tabs: All / Friendly / Professional / Blunt / Playful / Custom
- Search bar with real-time filtering
- Persona cards displaying: emoji avatar, name, description, tone badge, memory badge
- Persona preview modal on card click:
  + Full persona details
  + Sample conversation preview
  + \"Start Chat\" CTA
  + \"Add to Group Chat\" CTA - NEW
- 1-click start chat button on each card
- Empty state with CTA to create persona
- Loading skeleton cards

**Visual Requirements:**
- Bento-style card grid (3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile)
- Preview modal with glassmorphism backdrop
- Smooth modal open/close animations
- Card hover lift effect
- Category tabs with active state indicator

### 3.5 AI Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId) - ENHANCED
**Purpose:** Enhanced one-on-one AI chat with additional controls

**Core Functions:**
- Model selector dropdown showing current model with provider badge (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
- Web search toggle in input bar (enable/disable web search for current message)
- Persona quick-switch in sidebar history (switch active persona without leaving chat)
- Export conversation button with format options:
  + Export as PDF
  + Export as Markdown
- Maintain existing functionality: conversation sidebar, chat view, persona selection, chat input

**Visual Requirements:**
- Model selector dropdown with provider icons
- Web search toggle as icon button with active state
- Persona quick-switch as dropdown in sidebar
- Export button with dropdown menu
- Smooth transitions for all new controls

### 3.6 Credits & Pricing Page (/credits) - STRIPE INTEGRATION COMPLETE
**Purpose:** Complete Stripe integration with purchase flow and transaction history

**Core Functions:**
- Monthly/Annual toggle with \"Save 25%\" badge
- 3-tier pricing structure: Starter (free), Pro ($9/mo), Creator ($29/mo)
- Purchase flow:
  + Click \"Subscribe\" on plan card
  + Redirect to Stripe Checkout
  + Handle success/cancel callbacks
  + Update user credits and plan status
- Transaction history section:
  + Display past purchases with date, amount, plan, status
  + Download invoice button per transaction
- FAQ accordion section
- Trust row: \"SSL Secured · Cancel Anytime · Instant Access\"

**Visual Requirements:**
- Pro plan highlighted with gradient border and \"Most Popular\" badge
- Transaction history as table with pagination
- Loading states during Stripe redirect
- Success/error messages after purchase

### 3.7 Settings Page (/settings) - COMPLETED
**Purpose:** Complete API key management for all providers

**Core Functions:**
- API key management section listing all supported providers:
  + OpenAI
  + Anthropic
  + Google (Gemini)
  + Groq
  + Perplexity
  + Others as supported
- Add key flow:
  + Click \"Add Key\" for provider
  + Enter API key in secure input
  + Test key button to verify validity
  + Save key to user account
- Remove key flow:
  + Click \"Remove\" on existing key
  + Confirm deletion
- Test key flow:
  + Click \"Test\" on existing key
  + Display success/error message
- Account preferences section

**Visual Requirements:**
- Provider cards with logos
- Secure input fields (masked text)
- Test/Remove buttons with loading states
- Success/error toast notifications

### 3.8 Global Design Upgrade - PRODUCTION STANDARD
**Purpose:** Elevate entire platform to 2026 next-gen SaaS aesthetic

**Core Functions:**
- Apply glassmorphism panels to all card components
- Add animated gradient accents to hero sections
- Implement particle/grid background on hero sections
- Add smooth page transitions between routes
- Implement micro-animations on interactive elements:
  + Button hover effects
  + Card lift on hover
  + Input focus animations
  + Loading spinners
  + Success/error state animations

**Visual Requirements:**
- Glassmorphism: semi-transparent panels with backdrop blur
- Animated gradients: subtle color shifts on hero backgrounds
- Particle effects: floating particles or grid lines on hero sections
- Page transitions: fade or slide animations between routes
- Micro-animations: 200-300ms duration, smooth easing
- Consistent electric violet accent color
- Dark-first editorial aesthetic maintained

### 3.9 Existing Pages (Maintained)
**No Changes Required:**
- Agent Studio (/agent-studio) - already rebuilt in v19 Phase 7.1
- Contacts Page (/contacts) - already fixed
- System Test Page (/system-test) - already fixed
- Room Creation Page (/rooms/create)
- Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId)
- Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId)
- Persona Creation Page (/personas/create)
- Creator Dashboard (/dashboard)
- First-Run Onboarding Modal
- 404 Not Found Page

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 Multi-Persona Group Chat Logic
- User must select minimum 2 personas, maximum 6 personas
- Each persona responds in sequence after user message
- Each persona sees all prior messages in thread (user message + previous persona responses)
- Typing indicators display with persona avatar color while persona is generating response
- User can add personas mid-session (new persona sees full chat history)
- User can remove personas mid-session (removed persona stops responding)
- Session auto-saves after each message exchange
- User can manually save session with custom name
- Saved sessions persist in Group Chat Sessions List

### 4.2 Dashboard Stats Logic
- Total conversations: count of all AI chat conversations
- Personas created: count of user-created personas
- Debate rooms joined: count of rooms user has participated in
- Credits remaining: current credit balance
- Recent activity feed: last 5 items sorted by timestamp descending

### 4.3 Sidebar Navigation Logic
- Active state highlights current page with electric violet accent
- Hover effects on all navigation items
- Section dividers separate Core Features, Tools, Account
- BETA badge persists in footer area
- Give Feedback link opens feedback form or external tool

### 4.4 Persona Library Logic
- Category filter tabs: All shows all personas, other tabs filter by tone
- Search bar filters by persona name or description
- Search and filter work together (AND logic)
- Persona preview modal opens on card click
- \"Start Chat\" in modal redirects to /chat with selected persona
- \"Add to Group Chat\" in modal adds persona to group chat session
- 1-click start chat button on card redirects to /chat with selected persona
- Empty state shown when no personas match filters

### 4.5 AI Chat Enhancements Logic
- Model selector dropdown displays current model with provider badge
- Clicking model selector opens dropdown with all available models
- Web search toggle enables/disables web search for next message only
- Persona quick-switch dropdown in sidebar allows switching active persona without leaving chat
- Export conversation button opens dropdown with PDF/Markdown options
- Export generates file and triggers download

### 4.6 Stripe Integration Logic
- Clicking \"Subscribe\" on plan card redirects to Stripe Checkout
- Stripe Checkout pre-filled with user email
- Success callback updates user plan and credits in database
- Cancel callback returns user to Credits page with message
- Transaction history displays all completed purchases
- Invoice download button fetches invoice from Stripe and triggers download

### 4.7 API Key Management Logic
- Add key flow validates key format before saving
- Test key flow sends test request to provider API
- Test success displays green checkmark and success message
- Test failure displays red X and error message
- Remove key flow requires confirmation before deletion
- Masked input fields hide API key characters except last 4

### 4.8 Global Design Logic
- Glassmorphism panels use backdrop-filter: blur(10px) with semi-transparent background
- Animated gradients use CSS keyframe animations with 10-15s duration
- Particle effects use canvas or SVG with requestAnimationFrame
- Page transitions use React Router transition hooks
- Micro-animations use CSS transitions or Framer Motion
- All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query

### 4.9 Routing Logic
- Dashboard (/) is default landing page
- /group-chat displays Group Chat Sessions List
- /group-chat/:sessionId displays Group Chat Room for specific session
- /chat/:conversationId displays AI Chat Interface for specific conversation
- All other routes remain unchanged from v17

### 4.10 Existing Functionality Preserved
- All Phase 1-4 features continue working
- No paywall introduced
- No login requirement changes
- Multi-model support unchanged
- Image generation and input capabilities maintained
- Real-time messaging and fact-checking unchanged
- Persona creation, sharing, and management unchanged
- Credits system unchanged

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| User selects fewer than 2 personas for group chat | Display error message: \"Select at least 2 personas\" |
| User selects more than 6 personas for group chat | Disable selection after 6th persona, show message: \"Maximum 6 personas\" |
| Persona fails to respond in group chat | Display error message in chat thread, skip to next persona |
| User removes all personas mid-session | Display message: \"Add at least 2 personas to continue\" |
| Group chat session fails to save | Display error toast, retry save automatically |
| Dashboard stats fail to load | Display loading skeleton, show error message after timeout |
| Recent activity feed empty | Display empty state: \"No recent activity\" |
| Quick-start card CTA fails | Display error toast, log error for debugging |
| Sidebar navigation fails to highlight active page | Fallback to manual active state detection |
| Persona library search returns no results | Display empty state: \"No personas found\" |
| Persona preview modal fails to load | Display error message in modal, provide close button |
| Model selector dropdown fails to load models | Display current model only, show error message |
| Web search toggle fails to enable search | Display error toast, disable toggle |
| Export conversation fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| Stripe Checkout redirect fails | Display error message, provide retry button |
| Stripe success callback fails to update database | Log error, display message to contact support |
| Transaction history fails to load | Display loading skeleton, show error message after timeout |
| Invoice download fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| API key test request fails | Display error message with details from provider |
| API key save fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| Glassmorphism not supported in browser | Fallback to solid background with opacity |
| Animated gradient causes performance issues | Reduce animation complexity or disable on low-end devices |
| Particle effects cause performance issues | Reduce particle count or disable on low-end devices |
| Page transition stutters | Reduce transition duration or disable transitions |
| Micro-animations cause motion sickness | Respect prefers-reduced-motion, disable animations |
| Group chat typing indicator fails to display | Show generic loading message |
| Persona avatar color conflicts | Use predefined color palette with sufficient contrast |
| Session auto-save fails repeatedly | Display persistent error banner, provide manual save button |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. Dashboard page displays usage stats cards with correct data
2. Dashboard shows recent activity feed with last 5 items
3. Dashboard has 4 quick-start cards with working CTAs
4. Sidebar navigation has 3 sections: Core Features, Tools, Account
5. Sidebar shows icons and labels for all navigation items
6. Sidebar highlights active page with electric violet accent
7. Sidebar footer displays BETA badge and Give Feedback link
8. Group Chat Sessions List displays saved sessions with previews
9. Group Chat Sessions List has \"New Group Chat\" CTA
10. Group Chat Room allows selecting 2-6 personas from library
11. Group Chat Room displays user message followed by persona responses in sequence
12. Each persona in group chat sees prior persona responses
13. Typing indicators display with persona avatar color during response generation
14. User can add personas mid-session in group chat
15. User can remove personas mid-session in group chat
16. Group chat session auto-saves after each message exchange
17. User can manually save group chat session with custom name
18. Persona Library has category filter tabs: All, Friendly, Professional, Blunt, Playful, Custom
19. Persona Library has search bar with real-time filtering
20. Persona Library displays cards with emoji avatar, name, description, badges
21. Persona preview modal opens on card click
22. Persona preview modal has \"Start Chat\" and \"Add to Group Chat\" CTAs
23. 1-click start chat button on persona card redirects to /chat
24. AI Chat has model selector dropdown showing current model with provider badge
25. AI Chat has web search toggle in input bar
26. AI Chat has persona quick-switch in sidebar history
27. AI Chat has export conversation button with PDF/Markdown options
28. Credits page has complete Stripe integration with purchase flow
29. Credits page displays transaction history with past purchases
30. Transaction history has download invoice button per transaction
31. Settings page lists all supported API key providers
32. Settings page has add key flow with test and save functionality
33. Settings page has remove key flow with confirmation
34. Settings page has test key flow with success/error messages
35. Glassmorphism panels applied to all card components
36. Animated gradient accents on hero sections
37. Particle/grid background on hero sections
38. Smooth page transitions between routes
39. Micro-animations on button hover, card lift, input focus
40. All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
41. Electric violet design system applied consistently
42. Dark-first editorial aesthetic maintained
43. /group-chat route displays Group Chat Sessions List
44. /group-chat/:sessionId route displays Group Chat Room
45. Dashboard (/) is default landing page
46. All existing Phase 1-4 functionality continues working
47. No paywall introduced
48. No login requirement changes
49. Agent Studio page already rebuilt (no changes needed)
50. Contacts page already fixed (no changes needed)
51. System Test page already fixed (no changes needed)
52. All pages feel complete with no hollow placeholders
53. All pages meet 2026 next-gen SaaS design standard
54. Group chat supports minimum 2 personas, maximum 6 personas
55. Group chat typing indicators use distinct avatar colors per persona

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- Voice input/output for group chat
- Video avatars for personas in group chat
- Real-time collaboration (multiple users in same group chat session)
- Group chat session sharing with other users
- Advanced persona behavior customization (emotion, memory depth)
- Persona marketplace or community ratings
- Advanced analytics dashboard with charts and graphs
- Export group chat sessions as video or audio
- Custom color schemes per user
- White-label or custom branding options
- Mobile native apps (iOS/Android)
- Offline mode or PWA capabilities
- Advanced API key encryption beyond standard security
- Multi-language support for UI text
- Accessibility audit beyond WCAG AA
- A/B testing framework
- Advanced performance monitoring
- Custom particle effect templates
- Animated background customization per user
- Advanced loading state configurations
- Feedback analytics dashboard
- Beta badge removal mechanism
- Advanced sorting options for persona library
- Saved filter preferences for persona library
- Currency selection for pricing page
- Regional pricing for different countries
- FAQ search functionality
- Advanced filtering for transaction history
- Bulk API key import/export
- API key usage analytics
- Custom glassmorphism intensity controls
- Page transition customization per user
- Micro-animation speed controls

content.text: {"versionDesc":"Implement production-ready multi-persona group chat, Dashboard overhaul, 2026 aesthetic, and full AI agent pipeline","versionId":"app_version-bzqsy4yv1pts","versionLabel":"v21"}
